title: Making Plans at the Rooftop
description: Suggestions and invitations: Let's… / Why don't we… / How about… / Would you like to… / Shall we…
summary_pt_br: Fazer sugestões e convites em inglês: Let's + verbo base, Why don't we + verbo, How about + verbo-ing, Would you like to + verbo, Shall we + verbo base. Aceitar/recusar: Sure! / That sounds great / I'd love to but...

scenes.text_en:
'LET'S meet at 5,' Bia said.
'WHY DON'T WE go to the beach?'
'HOW ABOUT bringing snacks?'
'WOULD YOU LIKE TO come, Joca?'
'SHALL WE invite Maya too?'
Five ways to say the same thing. Pick one and go.
scenes.text_pt:
'Vamos nos encontrar às 5,' disse a Bia.
'Por que a gente não vai pra praia?'
'Que tal levar lanches?'
'Você gostaria de ir, Joca?'
'Vamos convidar a Maya também?'
Cinco jeitos de dizer a mesma coisa.

scenes.title: Five ways to suggest — what follows each
scenes.body_en: LET'S + BASE verb. 'Let's GO.' WHY DON'T WE + BASE verb. 'Why don't we LEAVE?' HOW ABOUT + -ING. 'How about LEAVING?' WOULD YOU LIKE TO + BASE verb. 'Would you like to COME?' SHALL WE + BASE verb (British). 'Shall we DANCE?' The trap: 'How about' needs -ING, not base.
scenes.body_pt: Estruturas: Let's + verbo base. Why don't we + verbo base. How about + verbo-ing (atenção!). Would you like to + verbo base. Shall we + verbo base. A pegadinha: 'How about' pede -ING, os outros pedem forma base.

examples.en: Let's go / How about going / Would you like to go?

items.term: I'd love to, but I can't.

exercise.question: Complete: 'Would you like ___ come to dinner?'
exercise.explanation: WOULD YOU LIKE + TO + base verb.

pairs: Por que a gente não vai?
exercise.explanation: Five ways. Same meaning, different register.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cinco formas. Mesmo sentido, registros diferentes.

turns.pt: Que tal ver o pôr do sol?

exercise.question: Complete: "How ___ going to the beach?"
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "How about going to the beach?"

exercise.question: Pick the best response. (LET'S + base.)
options: Let's meet at nine in the morning.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Let's meet at nine in the morning."

scenes.title: Making plans with Bia
scenes.pt_summary: Sugestões e combinações — Let's, How about, What if.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What should we do on Saturday?
turns.pt: O que vamos fazer no sábado?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How about going to the beach?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Let's meet at nine in the morning.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, let's bring sandwiches and fruit.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Then we can watch a movie instead.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good plan. Should I invite Rafa?

scenes.title: Listening story — Making Plans at the Rooftop
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Bia and a student. Suggestions and invitations: Let's… / Why don't we… / How about… / Would you like to… / Shall we… Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: What should we do on Saturday?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: How about going to the beach?

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Let's meet at nine in the morning.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Yes, let's bring sandwiches and fruit.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Bia. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Making Plans at the Rooftop". Suggestions and invitations: Let's… / Why don't we… / How about… / Would you like to… / Shall we… Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Making Plans at the Rooftop". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Making Plans at the Rooftop'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Making Plans at the Rooftop".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.

sources.label: Perfect English Grammar
sources.pt_hint: Regras de gramática + exercícios interativos gratuitos.

sources.label: British Council · A2
sources.pt_hint: Leituras A2 com exercícios de compreensão.
